  "findings": [
    "Missing supplemental grounding electrode as required by code when a single rod, pipe, or plate electrode is used."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a supplemental grounding electrode (such as a second ground rod spaced at least 6 feet apart) to meet the NEC requirements."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC 250.53(A)(2), a single rod, pipe, or plate electrode must be supplemented by an additional electrode of a type specified in 250.52(A)(2) through (A)(8) unless it has a resistance to earth of 25 ohms or less. Since the supplemental electrode is missing and no resistance test has proven 25 ohms or less, the installation is non-compliant.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.53(A)(2)",
    "NEC 250.50"
  ]
}
